nodes.norm_label: pip video/cook mode step-sync via window customevents

nodes.norm_label: spec a: structured ingredient (_struct) as source of truth over string re-parse

nodes.label: v16 Unified Schema Upgrade (Food/Unit entities, nutrition, directionsStructured)
nodes.norm_label: v16 unified schema upgrade (food/unit entities, nutrition, directionsstructured)

nodes.label: Floating Picture-in-Picture Video Player (concept)
nodes.rationale: Powers the Floating PiP player used on Meal Library + Cook Mode; MVP supports only YouTube (full embed control) and Instagram (locked embed, no scrub) — Instagram's public embed shell intentionally forbids programmatic seek.

nodes.label: weekPlanner.js — A-1 Smart Weekly Auto-Plan Scoring Engine
nodes.norm_label: weekplanner.js — a-1 smart weekly auto-plan scoring engine

nodes.label: Scoring weight table (W)
nodes.rationale: Additive, bounded scoring so signals compose predictably: course fit, cuisine variety (penalize adjacent/repeat), recency (rest recently-cooked meals, boost fresh ones), weeknight time budget, dietary preference (large exclusion penalty), and jitter to keep re-rolls lively without overriding strong signals.

nodes.label: main.jsx — App Entry Point & Share-Target Wiring
nodes.norm_label: main.jsx — app entry point & share-target wiring

nodes.label: Service Worker registration + background sync wiring
nodes.norm_label: service worker registration + background sync wiring

nodes.label: Android/iOS Share-Target Import Flow (concept)
nodes.rationale: User taps 'Share → SpiceHub' from Instagram/TikTok; OS hands a URL or text blob; a CustomEvent 'spicehub:share-import' is dispatched for App.jsx to pick up and route into ImportModal via parseHybrid, avoiding manual copy-paste.

nodes.label: Controlled taxonomies: COURSE / DISH_TYPE / CUISINE / DIETARY_TAGS
nodes.norm_label: controlled taxonomies: course / dish_type / cuisine / dietary_tags

nodes.label: Ingredients-vs-Directions classification rule (concept)
nodes.rationale: Most important extraction rule: an ingredient is quantity+unit+food+prep with no action verb; a direction is an imperative action step. Post-extraction re-scan moves any ingredient beginning with a cooking verb into directions and vice versa — this is the deterministic cross-check enforced downstream by enforceDeterministicRules.

nodes.label: finalizeAIRecipe (single exit point for every LLM path)
nodes.norm_label: finalizeairecipe (single exit point for every llm path)

nodes.label: Custom tiny templating engine instead of npm mustache (concept)
nodes.rationale: Avoids an npm dependency; recipe templating only needs {{var}}, sections, and inverted sections (~40 lines), and must run in worker threads/service workers with no JSX/React dependency.
nodes.norm_label: custom tiny templating engine instead of npm mustache (concept)

nodes.label: Zero-auth Reddit .json endpoint trick (concept)
nodes.rationale: Any reddit.com URL + .json returns full structured JSON without OAuth; unauthenticated rate limit ~60 req/min per IP; zero-cost, no Reddit API key, no Apify/Firecrawl needed for Reddit specifically.

nodes.label: Instagram/Meta CDN no-cache decision (concept)
nodes.rationale: Registering ANY route for cdninstagram.com/fbcdn.net causes Workbox respondWith() to surface uncaught no-response errors when IG blocks hotlinking (403/CORS); by not registering a route at all, requests bypass the SW and fail/succeed like a normal page fetch, handled by caller try/catch. SpiceHub instead persists images as base64 at import time.

nodes.label: MODEL_MAP (Whisper tier → HuggingFace ONNX model id)
nodes.norm_label: model_map (whisper tier → huggingface onnx model id)

nodes.label: VITE_GEMINI_RESPONSE_SCHEMA flag gating systemInstruction/responseSchema (concept)
nodes.rationale: Default false: no systemInstruction, no responseMimeType sent to Gemini — only when the flag is true does the app send the schema-aware SYSTEM_INSTRUCTION + responseSchema. Documented as a regression fix note tied to recipeParser.js.

nodes.label: BrowserAssist fast-path (skip pipeline if caption present) (concept)
nodes.rationale: When seed._skipPipelineIfCaption is true AND seed.capturedCaption is present, BrowserAssist skips the full importFromInstagram pipeline and calls captionToRecipe directly, eliminating a redundant second Apify call.
nodes.norm_label: browserassist fast-path (skip pipeline if caption present) (concept)
